rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF OTIS R. DAMSLET
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/28/23 for the following issues: 1) Petition has not been verified by the executor (an unverified pleading may be proved by filing a supplemental declaration that identifies the pleading by caption and its filing date). 2) Allegation has not been made as to when I&A will be filed and why it cannot be filed now. 3) Allegation has not been made as to whether all notice under Probate Code 9202 have been given. 4) Notice of Hearing has not been filed. 5) Proposed order has not been submitted, which should be e-lodged. All required documents to be filed and provided by 11/13/23.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1. A signed copy of the Trust and the pour-over will have not been filed (in a new PTR case). LRSF 14.47.P. 2. Clarification of whether the conservatee's existing trust has been amended and reinstated as the court ordered. Counsel reported that Charles Schwab account was transferred to the Trust; however, neither a signed copy of the trust nor a request for the trustee's bond has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JEWEL DENT REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST DATED 8/30/17
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition Under Probate Code 850 For Order Determining That Certain Real Property, Located In The Cit
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2023, as the following issues (see tentative ruling for 09/20/2023 hearing) remain unaddressed: 1) Each occupant of the 1142 Fitzgerald property identified by the declaration filed on 09/01/2023 must be served in the manner required by Probate Code section 851(a)(2) and CCP sections 413.10 et seq. The proofs of service on file show the occupants were served by mail, which is not a manner authorized by the CCP sections applicable to service of process. If the occupants were served under CCP section 415.30, POS-015 forms signed by the occupants (at least 30 days before the continued hearing) must be filed with a proof of service. If the occupants waived formal service, waivers signed by the occupants must be filed. 2) The addresses of Jewell Hall's 3 children must be confirmed by a verified allegation, as paragraph 14 of the petition did not list them.
